title: AI Just Crossed The Line We Were Afraid Of: Continual Harness
summary: Continual Harness is a system developed by Princeton researchers that enables AI agents to self-improve while running without resets. The system can modify its own instructions, create helper agents, build reusable tools, store memories, and fix mistakes continuously. Initial demonstrations include an AI agent playing Pokémon games that iteratively improves its performance.
